citation_and_locator: Lam, Charles; Chaak-ming Lau; Jackson L. Lee. 2024. Multi-Tiered Cantonese Word Segmentation. LREC-COLING 2024, pp. 11993-12002; section 4.5.2, PDF pp. 5-6 / proceedings pp. 11997-11998.
what_it_supports: Directly says `jau5` combines productively with `dak1` to indicate possibility of the following event; negative `mou5-dak1` denotes unavailability or impossibility; supplies exact `sin1zi3 jau5-dak1 tai2...` and `mou5-dak1 tai2 Sailor Moon...` examples.
limit: The paper is primarily about segmentation. It does not establish a complete syntactic representation, semantic subtype inventory, subject structure, or unrestricted predicate productivity.
